title: nycterium rostratum
intro: Nycterium rostratum, also known as the night-blooming clematis or traveler's joy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nycterium rostratum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Nycterium rostratum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
